name: Radware Bot Manager
description: Radware Bot Manager (formerly ShieldSquare) uses intent-based deep-behavior analysis and device fingerprinting to detect and block bad bots, scraping, ATO and payment fraud across web, mobile and APIs. It offers connectors for major CDNs an

seo.title: Radware Bot Manager — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Radware Bot Manager: Radware Bot Manager (formerly ShieldSquare) uses intent-based deep-behavior analysis and device fingerprinting to detect and block bad bots

when_to_use: Intent-based bot detection for e-commerce scraping protection
ATO prevention via behavioral fingerprinting at login
Payment fraud bot blocking for checkout and card testing
CDN-integrated bot management for Cloudflare and Akamai
API abuse prevention via bot scoring for mobile backends

pros: CDN and cloud connectors across major providers
Covers web, mobile and API surfaces
Backed by established Radware security org
cons: Older ShieldSquare roots show in places
UI and reporting feel dated vs newer rivals
review.verdict: A dependable enterprise bot manager if Radware is already in your stack, otherwise newer tools feel sharper.
review.best_for: Enterprises already standardized on Radware WAF or DDoS adding bot protection.
review.not_for: Startups and engineering-led teams that want modern developer ergonomics.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
